headline: Morgan Stanley Names Targa Resources (TRGP) a Top Pick
summary: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE:TRGP) is one of the 8 Best Infrastructure Stocks to Buy with Highest Upside Potential. On April 22, 2026, Morgan Stanley named Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE:TRGP) its top pick in the midstream energy infrastructure space. The firm said associated gas production in the Permian Basin could accelerate faster than the market expects […]
